appDetail.title: Application detail
appDetail.notFound: This application could not be found.
appDetail.noNotes: You have not added any notes.
appDetail.submitConflict: This application can't be submitted right now.
appDetail.draftHint: This application is a draft — submit it when you're ready.
appDetail.confirmLabel: I confirm the application data is correct and ready to submit.
appDetail.withdrawDialogBody: This will permanently withdraw your application. This action cannot be undone.
appDetail.withdrawError: Could not withdraw the application. Please try again.

form.title: Application form
form.intro: Fill in the answers, attach the required documents, then submit.
form.noVaultDocs: You haven't uploaded any documents yet.
form.notesPlaceholder: Private notes for yourself before you submit…
form.incomplete: Fill in every required field and attach at least one document before submitting.
form.confirmRequired: Please confirm the data before submitting.

documents.uploadError: Could not upload the file. Please try again.
documents.reuseFromVault: Or reuse a file you already uploaded

scholarshipProviderScholarships.title: My scholarships
scholarshipProviderScholarships.subtitle: Every scholarship listing your organisation has created.
scholarshipProviderScholarships.empty: You have not created any scholarships yet.

actions.archiveConfirm: Archive this scholarship? Students can no longer find it after this.

form.fieldsOfStudyHint: Leave blank to accept all fields. Select one or more eligible majors.
form.reviewFeeHint: The amount a student pays your organisation when they click Apply Now. ScholarPath retains a 10% platform commission from the final captured amount. Set to 0 to mark the scholarship as free.
form.paymentsDisabledNotice: Payments are currently disabled platform-wide. This scholarship will be free for students and no Review Service Fee applies.
form.reviewFeeMin: Review Service Fee cannot be negative.
form.error: Could not save the scholarship. Please try again.
form.reviewNotice: New scholarships are reviewed by an admin before they go live. You can track the status from your scholarships dashboard.
form.requiredDocsHint: List the document types applicants must upload (e.g. Transcript, Recommendation Letter).

scholarshipModeration.title: Scholarship moderation
scholarshipModeration.subtitle: Review scholarships submitted by companies before they go live.

communityModeration.title: Community moderation
communityModeration.subtitle: Posts flagged by members or hidden automatically.
communityModeration.empty: No posts need moderation right now.
communityModeration.removeConfirm: Remove this post? It will be hidden from the community.
communityModeration.keepSuccess: Flags dismissed — the post stays visible.
